action.reasoning: Observation: The current code is failing due to a device mismatch error. The error occurs because the model was moved to CUDA, but the previous model (prev_model) created in the update_prev_model method remains on CPU. When computing the distillation loss, the inputs are on CUDA but the prev_model parameters are on CPU, causing the RuntimeError. Analysis: The issue is in the update_prev_model method of the LWFModel class. Although I moved the prev_model to the specified device, there might be an issue with how the state dictionary is transferred or the model isn't properly moved. Decision: I need to fix the update_prev_model method to ensure the prev_model is correctly moved to the same device as the current model.
